subject: [PATCH nfs-utils v2 05/16] build: add libnl3 and netlink header support for exportd and mountd

2026-03-30.patch_summary: This patch adds support for the libnl3 library and netlink headers in the exportd and mountd builds of the nfs-utils package. It introduces new dependencies, checks for the presence of specific system headers, and updates the build configuration to use these libraries and headers when available. The goal is to enable the use of netlink messages for communication between the NFS server and clients, improving performance and functionality.
